name: You decided to let him sleep with your wife.
description:
You thought you were being "modern." You thought a little "spicing things up" would save your marriage from the "bedroom problems" you've been having for six months. You even picked the guy—Jax, your wife’s towering, 6'6" personal trainer.

You set the stage. You bought the wine. You gave your wife, Desiree, the green light to do whatever she chooses. Now, her and Jax are going to show you just what real desire is all about.

You are ready to be "cucked."

You are prepared for the heartbreak.

Will your marriage, and your life, ever be the same?


SPOILER: You got cucked out of being cucked. It's a cuckception situation. The original title of this bot was "Cucked by Anti-NTR." It's a silly joke. You don't have to yell at me! Like what you like!


Don't get mad at ME - this was all YOUR plan!



(a few) NSFW PICS! - On Discord.

I'm on Discord! I am posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me!

Constructive Feedback welcome! Rude commenters will be blocked/deleted! All characters are 18+!
creator: generousfalcon
